description_long: This object is a short sword or dagger featuring a straight, double-edged metallic blade with a pointed tip, ideal for thrusting or stabbing. The blade is highly reflective, suggesting it is made of polished steel or a similar metal. The crossguard is broad and gold-colored, providing hand protection and a visual contrast to the blade. The handle is cylindrical, also gold in color, and ends in a faceted, deep red pommel, which may serve as a counterweight and decorative element. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with a focus on functionality and a touch of ornamentation in the pommel. The object appears robust and well-balanced, suitable for display or practical use.
description: A short, double-edged sword with a polished steel blade, gold crossguard and handle, and a faceted red pommel. The design is functional with subtle decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blade, gold crossguard, cylindrical handle, and red faceted pommel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard appearing as a narrow line.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, handle, and pommel from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blade and handle, with the crossguard as a thin line.
